chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-738 of 2023 (Rashid Ali Ghanghro Vs. SSP Sukkur & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For Orders on CMA No. 6315/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case. 15-11-2023. Mr. Amanullah G.Malik, advocate for the applicant. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. Granted. 3. The applicant by preferring the instant Crl. Misc. Application has impugned the order dated 04-10-2023 passed by learned Ist Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Sukkur whereby his application 22 A/B Cr.P.C for issuance of direction against the police to record his FIR, is dismissed. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the incident for demand of Bhatta at the hands of the proposed accused has actually taken place and for that FIR of the applicant is not being recorded by the police, then he has an alternate remedy to exhaust by filing a direct complaint of such incident before the Court having jurisdiction; such remedy if is exhausted besides being alternate would be adequate in the circumstances of the case. Even otherwise no illegality is noticed in impugned order which may justify this Court to make interference with the same by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application, it is dismissed in limine. Judge Nasim/P.A
